languages.text: "Да. Я лишь прошу прощения, что обременил вас своими бедами, а после посмел обмануть доверие снова. Плоть слаба, и моя — не исключение".
"Yes. I only apologise for burdening you with my troubles, and then daring to betray your trust again. Flesh is weak, and mine is no exception."
languages.original_text: "Да. Я лишь прошу прощения, что обременил вас своими бедами, а после посмел обмануть доверие снова. Плоть слаба, и моя — не исключение".

traits.locale_text: "Yes. I only apologise for burdening you with my troubles, and then daring to betray your trust again. Flesh is weak, and mine is no exception."
"Yes. I only apologise for burdening you with my troubles, and then daring to betray your trust again. Flesh is weak, and mine is no exception."
"Yes. I only apologise for burdening you with my troubles, and then daring to betray your trust again. Flesh is weak, and mine is no exception."

languages.text: «Sí. Solo lamento haberle molestado con mis problemas y haber traicionado su confianza una vez más. La carne es débil, y la mía no es ninguna excepción».
languages.original_text: "Yes. I only apologise for burdening you with my troubles, and then daring to betray your trust again. Flesh is weak, and mine is no exception."

traits.locale_text: «Sí. Solo lamento haberle molestado con mis problemas y haber traicionado su confianza una vez más. La carne es débil, y la mía no es ninguna excepción».

languages.text: “是的。给您添了这么多麻烦，并再次辜负了您的信任，对此我深感抱歉。血肉苦弱，我也不例外啊。”
languages.original_text: "Yes. I only apologise for burdening you with my troubles, and then daring to betray your trust again. Flesh is weak, and mine is no exception."

traits.locale_text: “是的。给您添了这么多麻烦，并再次辜负了您的信任，对此我深感抱歉。血肉苦弱，我也不例外啊。”

languages.text: « Oui. J'ajouterai seulement que je m'excuse de vous accabler avec mes problèmes et d'avoir osé trahir à nouveau votre confiance. La chair est faible, et la mienne ne fait pas exception. »
languages.original_text: "Yes. I only apologise for burdening you with my troubles, and then daring to betray your trust again. Flesh is weak, and mine is no exception."

traits.locale_text: « Oui. J'ajouterai seulement que je m'excuse de vous accabler avec mes problèmes et d'avoir osé trahir à nouveau votre confiance. La chair est faible, et la mienne ne fait pas exception. »

languages.text: "Evet. Sadece sizi dertlerimle uğraştırdığım ve sonra da güveninize tekrar ihanet etme cüretini gösterdiğim için özür dilerim. Et zayıftır, benimki de istisna değil."
languages.original_text: "Yes. I only apologise for burdening you with my troubles, and then daring to betray your trust again. Flesh is weak, and mine is no exception."

traits.locale_text: "Evet. Sadece sizi dertlerimle uğraştırdığım ve sonra da güveninize tekrar ihanet etme cüretini gösterdiğim için özür dilerim. Et zayıftır, benimki de istisna değil."

languages.text: "Ja. Ich entschuldige mich nur, Euch mit meinen Problemen belastet zu haben. Fleisch ist schwach. Das gilt auch für meines."
languages.original_text: "Yes. I only apologise for burdening you with my troubles, and then daring to betray your trust again. Flesh is weak, and mine is no exception."

traits.locale_text: "Ja. Ich entschuldige mich nur, Euch mit meinen Problemen belastet zu haben. Fleisch ist schwach. Das gilt auch für meines."

languages.text: 「私はただ、あなたに負担をかけたこと、そしてまたあなたの信頼を裏切ることを詫びるだけです。肉は弱く、私の肉も例外ではない」
languages.original_text: "Yes. I only apologise for burdening you with my troubles, and then daring to betray your trust again. Flesh is weak, and mine is no exception."

traits.locale_text: 「私はただ、あなたに負担をかけたこと、そしてまたあなたの信頼を裏切ることを詫びるだけです。肉は弱く、私の肉も例外ではない」
